_meta.title: Bricks MCP Open — Full Test Suite
_meta.description: Comprehensive test plan for bricks-mcp-open (105 tools). Run against a test WordPress site with Bricks Builder + bricks-api-bridge plugin installed. Tests are ordered by dependency: connection → read → write → cleanup.
prerequisites: WordPress site with Bricks Builder active
Application Password configured in .env or sites.json
At least one published page with Bricks data
_meta.usage: Use this file as a test checklist. Each test has: tool name, input args, expected behavior, and pass criteria. Run tests in order within each phase. Phase 1 (read-only) is safe to run on production. Phases 2-4 create/modify/delete data — use a test site.
notes: Replace all {{PAGE_ID}} with a real page ID on your test site
Replace all {{TEMPLATE_ID}} with a real template ID
Replace all {{POST_ID}} with a real post ID
Replace all {{MENU_ID}} with a menu ID created during tests
Tests marked 'destructive: true' modify or delete data

phase_1_connection_and_read.description: Read-only tests — verify connection, list resources, read data. Safe to run on any site.

tests.description: Verify WordPress connection and plugin status
tests.expected: Returns site URL, WordPress version, Bricks version, plugin version, PHP version, user role

tests.description: Check which site is currently active
tests.expected: Returns active site key, label, and URL
pass_criteria: Site key matches .env or sites.json config

tests.expected: Returns list of configured sites with keys and labels
Returns list of pages with ID, title, slug, status, element count, URL
pass_criteria: Each page has ID, title, slug
All returned pages have status PUBLISH

tests.description: Get full Bricks data for a specific page
tests.expected: Returns page header (ID, title, status, URL, element count) + full bricks_data JSON array
pass_criteria: Each element has id, name, parent fields
Element IDs are 6 chars alphanumeric with at least 1 digit

tests.expected: Returns indented element tree instead of raw JSON
pass_criteria: Output contains element tree with indentation
Elements show name, label (if set), and ID
No raw JSON array in output

tests.expected: Returns pages matching the search query
pass_criteria: Results contain pages with 'Home' in title (or empty if none exist)

tests.description: Search elements by type across all pages
tests.expected: Returns heading elements from all pages
pass_criteria: Results list page ID, page title, element name, element ID
Each result shows matched_field and matched_value

tests.expected: Returns script content or '(none)' if no scripts set
Returns structured assets (css, js, js_deps, raw_footer) or legacy fallback info
pass_criteria: Asset sizes reported (or legacy message shown)

tests.description: Get SEO metadata for a page
tests.expected: Returns SEO title, description, OG tags, canonical, robots, keywords
pass_criteria: All SEO fields listed (even if '(not set)')

tests.description: Get JSON-LD structured data for a page
tests.expected: Returns schema objects or 'No JSON-LD schema set' message
pass_criteria: If schemas exist, @type is present in each

tests.expected: Returns page settings or 'using defaults' message
pass_criteria: Settings displayed as JSON or defaults message shown

tests.expected: Returns template list with ID, title, type
pass_criteria: Each template shows ID, title, template_type
Results match query or empty result set

tests.expected: Returns list of global classes with names and settings
pass_criteria: Each class has ID and name

tests.description: Show where global classes are used
tests.expected: Returns usage map: which pages/elements use which classes
pass_criteria: Usage data returned or empty set

tests.expected: Returns array of color definitions with id, name, raw values
pass_criteria: Colors listed with names and hex/rgb values

tests.expected: Returns list of custom fonts or 'default fonts' message
pass_criteria: Font list or default message shown

tests.expected: Returns CSS variables defined in Bricks

pass_criteria: At least tablet and mobile breakpoints listed

tests.expected: Returns theme style settings (typography, colors, spacing)
pass_criteria: Theme styles returned or 'no theme styles' message

tests.expected: Returns page count, element count, template count, etc.
Returns registered post types (page, post, etc.)
pass_criteria: Each type has name and label

tests.expected: Returns list of presets with names and descriptions
pass_criteria: At least 1 preset listed (25 shipped by default)
Each preset has name and element count
All returned presets are hero category

tests.description: List named snapshots for a page
tests.expected: Returns snapshot list with names and timestamps
Returns media items with ID, title, URL, mime type
pass_criteria: Each item has ID and URL

tests.description: Run bulk SEO audit across all published pages
tests.expected: Returns scores for each page (0-100), sorted worst first
pass_criteria: Each page has score, ID, slug

tests.description: Deep SEO analysis for a single page
tests.expected: Returns detailed score breakdown with checks, headings, images, links, keyword analysis
pass_criteria: Individual check items with pass/warn/fail status
Word count, heading count, image count present

tests.expected: Returns readability metrics (Flesch score, sentence length, etc.)
Returns OG/Twitter preview data (title, description, image)
Returns info about active SEO plugins (Yoast, RankMath, etc.) or 'none detected'

tests.description: Check for broken links on a page
tests.expected: Returns link check results (status codes, broken links)

pass_criteria: Sitemap data returned or 'not found' message

tests.expected: Returns redirect rules or empty list
Returns post list with ID, title, status, date

pass_criteria: Each category has ID and name

tests.expected: Returns tag list or empty set
Returns breakpoint widths matching Bricks defaults

phase_2_write_and_create.description: Write tests — create pages, templates, classes, snapshots. Run on a TEST SITE only.

tests.description: Create a safety snapshot before write tests

args.name: pre-test-snapshot
args.description: Safety snapshot before running MCP test suite

tests.expected: Snapshot created with ID and timestamp
tests.note: MUST run this before any write tests

tests.expected: New page created with returned ID
tests.creates: {{TEST_PAGE_ID}} — save this ID for subsequent tests

tests.description: Write Bricks elements to the test page

settings.text: This is a test paragraph created by the MCP test suite.

tests.expected: Page updated with 5 elements, backup auto-created

tests.description: Verify the elements were saved correctly
tests.expected: Element tree shows section > container > heading + text-basic + button
pass_criteria: IDs match: sec001, con001, hdr001, txt001, btn001

tests.description: Patch: update heading text + add new element
Append a new section to the page
Set SEO metadata on test page

args.description: This page was created by the bricks-mcp test suite to verify all 105 tools work correctly.

pass_criteria: Fields updated: seo_title, description, noindex, focus_keyword

tests.expected: Returns the SEO data set in T107

tests.description: Set JSON-LD schema on test page

tests.expected: Structured assets saved (CSS in head, JS deps enqueued, JS in footer)
Class updated with new background color
Returns BEM class definitions for card component

args.title: MCP Test Post
args.content: This post was created by the MCP test suite.

tests.description: Add items to the test menu

args.name: mcp-test-hero
args.description: Test hero preset created by MCP test suite

tests.expected: Returns instantiated elements with variables replaced

tests.description: Build a page from preset + raw elements
tests.expected: Page built with 2 sections (1 preset + 1 raw)
Returns Bricks element array from HTML
pass_criteria: Section, container, heading, text, button/link elements present

tests.expected: Returns media items with suggested alt text/title improvements
Returns site metadata (title, description, tech stack)

phase_3_validation_and_edge_cases.description: Edge case and validation tests — invalid inputs, boundary conditions, error handling.

tests.expected: Error message about page not found
Validation error about invalid ID format

tests.description: Submit element with no digits in ID
tests.expected: Validation error — IDs must contain at least 1 digit
Either accepted (clears page) or validation warning
tests.note: May clear the page — restore from snapshot after

tests.description: Patch with invalid element ID in update
tests.expected: Validation error about invalid element ID
Auto-fix strips 'px' from line-height, converts to unitless
Error: at least one search parameter required

pass_criteria: Error message about unknown site key

tests.expected: Error: theme_styles must be an object

phase_4_cleanup.description: Clean up all test data. Run after all other phases. Restores original state.

tests.description: Restore original page from pre-test snapshot

manual_cleanup_notes: Delete test page ({{TEST_PAGE_ID}}) via WordPress Admin → Pages → Trash → Delete Permanently
Delete cloned page ({{CLONE_PAGE_ID}}) via WordPress Admin → Pages → Trash → Delete Permanently
Delete test post ({{TEST_POST_ID}}) via WordPress Admin → Posts → Trash → Delete Permanently
Delete test category ({{TEST_CATEGORY_ID}}) via WordPress Admin → Posts → Categories
Delete test tag ({{TEST_TAG_ID}}) via WordPress Admin → Posts → Tags
These cannot be deleted via MCP tools (no bricks_delete_page / bricks_wp_delete_post in the open-source edition)

phase_5_multi_site.description: Multi-site switching tests. Requires sites.json with at least 2 sites configured.
prerequisites: sites.json configured with at least 2 sites (e.g., 'production' and 'staging')

tests.description: Note current active site before switching

tests.expected: Returns pages from second site (different from first site)
pass_criteria: Pages listed (may differ from first site)

tools_not_directly_tested: bricks_upload_media — requires a local file path or URL; test manually
bricks_upload_font — requires a font file; test manually
bricks_register_font — requires font name and source; include in style system test
bricks_bulk_create_global_classes — variation of create; covered by single create test

test_id_variables.{{CLONE_PAGE_ID}}: Created in T114 — save the returned ID
test_id_variables.{{TEST_TEMPLATE_ID}}: Created in T115 — save the returned ID

test_id_variables.{{TEST_CLASS_ID}}: Created in T118 — save the returned class ID
test_id_variables.{{TEST_POST_ID}}: Created in T122 — save the returned ID
test_id_variables.{{TEST_CATEGORY_ID}}: Created in T125 — save the returned ID
test_id_variables.{{TEST_TAG_ID}}: Created in T126 — save the returned ID
test_id_variables.{{TEST_MENU_ID}}: Created in T127 — save the returned ID
test_id_variables.{{TEST_MENU_ITEM_ID}}: Created in T128 — save the returned ID
test_id_variables.{{TEST_SUBMENU_ITEM_ID}}: Created in T129 — save the returned ID
test_id_variables.{{PRE_TEST_SNAPSHOT_ID}}: Created in T100 — save the returned snapshot ID
test_id_variables.{{SECOND_SITE_KEY}}: Key from sites.json for your second site
test_id_variables.{{ORIGINAL_SITE_KEY}}: Key of your primary site (noted in T400)
